ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit or not */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "formed_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist or band was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genres FOREIGN KEY ("genres") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL to the analysis data for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "listen_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the track was listened to */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to listen to the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the track was listened to */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the track was played (e.g., playlist, radio, search) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was released */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
